actions.value:
Edge is a zero-knowledge app and we don't have access to the information shared with our exchange partners.

Please reach out directly to Kado regarding recent orders or to update personal information.


A Support Request can be submitted from their Helpdesk: https://faq.kado.money

Or you may email them directly, here: support@kado.money
